author: west-shell
description: Render xiangqi(Chinese chess) positions diagrams in a note.

manifest.author: weshell
manifest.description: Variation tree viewer and editor for Chinese chess (Xiangqi).
manifest.name: Chinese Chess

name: Chinese Chess

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/west-shell/obsidian-xiangqi/compare/3.5.0...3.5.2
- 木质和竹纹棋盘主题使用图片纹理，需要下载wood.png 和 bamboo.jpg，放入插件的 assets/ 目录：
- The Wood and Bamboo board themes use image textures. download wood.png and bamboo.jpg and place them in the plugin's assets/ folder:
.obsidian/plugins/xiangqi/
├── main.js
├── manifest.json
├── styles.css
└── assets/
 ---├── wood.png
 ---└── bamboo.jpg

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/west-shell/obsidian-xiangqi/compare/3.5.0...3.5.1
- 木质和竹纹棋盘主题使用图片纹理，需要下载wood.png 和 bamboo.jpg，放入插件的 assets/ 目录：
The Wood and Bamboo board themes use image textures. download wood.png and bamboo.jpg and place them in the plugin's assets/ folder:
.obsidian/plugins/xiangqi/
├── main.js
├── manifest.json
├── styles.css
└── assets/
    ├── wood.png
    └── bamboo.jpg
